title: Change default certs dir to /etc/containers/certs.d
body:
Updated man pages to reflect the change
Fixes https://github.com/projectatomic/libpod/issues/38 and https://github.com/projectatomic/libpod/issues/39

Signed-off-by: umohnani8 <umohnani@redhat.com>

comments.body: Are we just changing the c/image vendored files without revendoring? Can we pull in a new version of c/image to get the fix?

Nevermind, I'm dumb and didn't see a vendor.conf change
LGTM

:pushpin: Commit fff9a1e has been approved by `rhatdan`
